title: [FIRRTL] Exporter prints invalid probe of constant (, inline expressions?)

features.name: probing inline expression via reference send
features.description: Code should include a reference send operation where the operand is an inline expression (constant) rather than a reference to a named declaration

features.name: workaround using wire for probeable constant expression
features.description: Code should include a wire declaration used to hold a constant expression that will be probed via reference send, as workaround for inline expression probing limitation
